debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

proof:
rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    first | rw [← comp_id h, ← h1] | rw [← comp_id h, ← h2]
    rw [← assoc, w, assoc]
    first | rw [h1] | rw [h2]
    rw [comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    first | rw [← id_comp h, ← h1] | rw [← id_comp h, ← h2]
    rw [assoc, w, ← assoc]
    first | rw [h1] | rw [h2]
    rw [id_comp]
failed_attempts:
haveI := hf
  constructor
  · intro Z g h eq
    rw [← comp_id g, ← comp_id h, ← IsIso.hom_inv_id f, ← assoc, eq, assoc]
  · intro Z g h eq
    rw [← id_comp g, ← id_comp h, ← IsIso.inv_hom_id f, assoc, eq, ← assoc]

rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have := congrArg (· ≫ g) w
    simp only [assoc, h1, h2, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have := congrArg (g ≫ ·) w
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc] at this
    simp only [h1, h2, id_comp] at this
    exact this

rcases hf with ⟨inv, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← h1, assoc, w, assoc, h1, comp_id] <|>
      rw [← comp_id h, ← h2, assoc, w, assoc, h2, comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← h1, assoc, w, ← assoc, h1, id_comp] <|>
      rw [← id_comp h, ← h2, assoc, w, ← assoc, h2, id_comp]

have : IsIso f := hf
  constructor
  · intros W g h eq
    rw [← comp_id g, ← comp_id h, ← IsIso.hom_inv_id f, ← assoc, eq, assoc]
  · intros Z g h eq
    rw [← id_comp g, ← id_comp h, ← IsIso.inv_hom_id f, assoc, eq, ← assoc]

constructor
  · intros Z g h w
    exact ((Category.iso_equiv f).out 0 1).mp hf Z |>.1 w
  · intros Z g h w
    exact ((Category.iso_equiv f).out 0 2).mp hf Z |>.1 w

have ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hfg, assoc, assoc, w]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hgf, ← assoc, ← assoc, w]

cases hf with | intro g h_iso =>
  cases h_iso with | intro h1 h2 =>
  constructor
  · intro Z h k eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k]
    first
    | rw [← h1, ← assoc, eq, assoc, h1]
    | rw [← h2, ← assoc, eq, assoc, h2]
    simp
  · intro Z h k eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k]
    first
    | rw [← h1, assoc, eq, ← assoc, h1]
    | rw [← h2, assoc, eq, ← assoc, h2]
    simp

have := hf
  constructor
  · apply section_mono f (inv f) (IsIso.inv_hom_id f)
  · apply retraction_epi f (inv f) (IsIso.hom_inv_id f)

haveI := hf
  constructor
  · intros Z g h eq
    rw [← comp_id g, ← comp_id h, ← IsIso.hom_inv_id f, ← assoc, ← assoc, eq]
  · intros Z g h eq
    rw [← id_comp g, ← id_comp h, ← IsIso.inv_hom_id f, assoc, assoc, eq]

constructor
  · intros Z g h eq
    exact (((Category.iso_equiv f).out 0 1).mp hf Z).1 eq
  · intros Z g h eq
    exact (((Category.iso_equiv f).out 0 2).mp hf Z).1 eq
successful_attempts:
rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    first | rw [← comp_id h, ← h1] | rw [← comp_id h, ← h2]
    rw [← assoc, w, assoc]
    first | rw [h1] | rw [h2]
    rw [comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    first | rw [← id_comp h, ← h1] | rw [← id_comp h, ← h2]
    rw [assoc, w, ← assoc]
    first | rw [h1] | rw [h2]
    rw [id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, w, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, w, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    first
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hg1, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg1]
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hg2, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg2]
  · intro Z h k w
    first
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hg1, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg1]
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hg2, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg2]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k H
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, H, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intro Z h k H
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, H, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [w]
    simp only [assoc, hg1, hg2, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [w]
    simp only [← assoc, hg1, hg2, id_comp] at this
    exact this

rcases hf with ⟨inv, hom_inv, inv_hom⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hom_inv, ← assoc, w, assoc]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← inv_hom, assoc, w, ← assoc]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · apply section_mono f g; assumption
  · apply retraction_epi f g; assumption

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have eq : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [w]
    rw [assoc, assoc] at eq
    simp only [hfg, hgf, comp_id] at eq
    exact eq
  · intro Z h k w
    have eq : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [w]
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc] at eq
    simp only [hfg, hgf, id_comp] at eq
    exact eq

obtain ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, w, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, w, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, h₁, h₂⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k]
    first
    | rw [← h₁, ← assoc, w, assoc, h₁]
    | rw [← h₂, ← assoc, w, assoc, h₂]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k]
    first
    | rw [← h₁, assoc, w, ← assoc, h₁]
    | rw [← h₂, assoc, w, ← assoc, h₂]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [w]
    simp [assoc, hg, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [w]
    simp [← assoc, hg, id_comp] at this
    exact this

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [w]
    simp [assoc, hg1, hg2, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [w]
    simp [← assoc, hg1, hg2, id_comp] at this
    exact this

rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h]
    first
    | rw [← h1, ← assoc, w, assoc, h1]
    | rw [← h2, ← assoc, w, assoc, h2]
    rw [comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h]
    first
    | rw [← h1, assoc, w, ← assoc, h1]
    | rw [← h2, assoc, w, ← assoc, h2]
    rw [id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro _ h k w
    rw [← comp_id h]
    first
    | rw [← hg1, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg1]
    | rw [← hg2, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg2]
    exact comp_id k
  · intro _ h k w
    rw [← id_comp h]
    first
    | rw [← hg1, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg1]
    | rw [← hg2, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg2]
    exact id_comp k

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    have eq := congr_arg (fun x => x ≫ g) w
    simp only [assoc, hg1, hg2, comp_id] at eq
    exact eq
  · intro Z h k w
    have eq := congr_arg (fun x => g ≫ x) w
    simp only [← assoc, hg1, hg2, id_comp] at eq
    exact eq

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro W h k w
    first
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← hg1, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg1, comp_id]
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← hg2, ← assoc, w, assoc, hg2, comp_id]
  · intro Z h k w
    first
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← hg1, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg1, id_comp]
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← hg2, assoc, w, ← assoc, hg2, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨inv, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have eq := congrArg (fun x => x ≫ inv) w
    simp only [assoc, h1, h2, comp_id] at eq
    exact eq
  · intro Z h k w
    have eq := congrArg (fun x => inv ≫ x) w
    simp only [← assoc, h1, h2, id_comp] at eq
    exact eq

rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z a b e
    rw [← comp_id a, ← comp_id b]
    try rw [← h1, ← assoc, e, assoc, h1]
    try rw [← h2, ← assoc, e, assoc, h2]
  · intro Z a b e
    rw [← id_comp a, ← id_comp b]
    try rw [← h1, assoc, e, ← assoc, h1]
    try rw [← h2, assoc, e, ← assoc, h2]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [w]
    simp only [assoc, hg1, hg2, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [w]
    simp only [← assoc, hg1, hg2, id_comp] at this
    exact this

rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intros W h k w
    first
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← h1, ← assoc, w, assoc, h1, comp_id]
    | rw [← comp_id h, ← h2, ← assoc, w, assoc, h2, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k w
    first
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← h1, assoc, w, ← assoc, h1, id_comp]
    | rw [← id_comp h, ← h2, assoc, w, ← assoc, h2, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
  constructor
  · intros Z h k w
    rw [← comp_id h, ← hfg, ← assoc, w, assoc, hfg, comp_id]
  · intros Z h k w
    rw [← id_comp h, ← hgf, assoc, w, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp]

rcases hf with ⟨g, h1, h2⟩
  constructor
  · intro Z h k w
    have := congrArg (· ≫ g) w
    simp only [assoc, h1, h2, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k w
    have := congrArg (g ≫ ·) w
    simp only [← assoc, h1, h2, id_comp] at this
    exact this
